parts: Name this character, who declares “a plague on both your houses” while dying. This character tells a friend “If love be rough with you, be rough with love” to get over Rosaline before bringing him to a masquerade.
Two answers required. Mercutio’s deathbed curses are addressed to these two families, whose bloody feud in Verona is central to Romeo and Juliet.

Mercutio calls Tybalt a “ratcatcher” and a “prince of Cats,” referencing the character of Tibert in a set of stories named for this character. The medieval Latin mock epic Ysengrimus stars this character.
